Professional Workflow          →  GP Route Publication

The professional GP (delivery man) publishes a trip

the delivery drivers' trip

The trip must
appear in
customer searches

on Admin Panel
for the request

credit ​
remaining
?

credit number 
will not allow to have  a
new mission

credit again

to process
the user's request

we record the
information that will
allow us to activate
or deactivate
a delivery driver's trip

(5) Select the requested service:
1) Number of credits remaining

Other
operation
selection?

X3
→ Back to Menu

(4) Message:
Operation not available
→ Return

(6) Message :
If 1 → Give the number of credits remaining          
If 2 → Provide the credit purchase link                   
If 3 → Contact request acknowledged
<font dir="auto" style="vertical-align: inherit;"><font dir="auto" style="vertical-align: inherit;">END</font></font>

Professional workflow →  New mission

The professional receives a new assignment

(2) Message :
Summary
of the mission
<font dir="auto" style="vertical-align: inherit;"><font dir="auto" style="vertical-align: inherit;">Yes</font></font>

No or
after 7 minutes 
no response

Other
operation

Confirmation  of the
mission ?
(YES / NO)

(4) Message :
Share contact information
of the user who made the request

Notification :
Share the information from
professional
to the user who made the request

Credit count update:
A reduction of 3 credits
in the professional's remaining credits
END

Attention

1. The mission must align with the professional's
GP/Transporter path

2.  The professional must have at least 3 credits available

(5) Message :
The mission was declined

Credit count update:
A reduction of 1 credits
in the professional's remaining credits

Number
credit ​
remaining
?

(6) Message: Remaining
credit number 
will not allow to have  a
new mission
=> Please buy
credit again

Ask the system
to switch to another
professional with
the same route and condition
